{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324002538B8ABA823E0020A26E95D"}"},"total":31},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610888036235182873","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一开始选择的世界太过冷门。[微笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772056768,"group_id":"7600642581319388185","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxBrrakeDV3/rpdk4RPiPboGPjC/A6oj8CK3Csovfyf1","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7387ed8bcf0d41ae9bfc026fe0229c67~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882263&x-signature=gQYg7eb%2BbNGWfGDl7rmf8PQaNxI%3D","user_id":"4375710117142621","user_name":"无限永恒星"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4375710117142621","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":16,"fan_ranklist_title":"若见之","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7600642581319388185","book_info":{"abstract":"尤显赫穿越到一个类似于日漫异世界的世界，这个世界有魔物，有冒险者，有地下城，有迷宫，有秘境，有神明。
所有人都有职业，有等级，做任何事情都有熟练度，进度条。
勇者传说已经远去，但是魔王传说却近在眼前。
然而，当他升级的时候，他才发现，自己原来是有金手指的！
当数据化力量被分享到诸天万界，无穷世界终于迎来一个做任何事情都没有瓶颈的超级天才。
【广东十虎，鬼灭，天龙，一人，大唐双龙，侠岚，成龙历险记，僵尸道长毛小方，魔幻手机，火影，海贼】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0df956969b6bfc994f0d9888b6e7bab1","author":"若行之","author_id":"","book_id":"7600642581319388185","book_name":"同穿：我在诸天升级","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7602553732164747801","read_count":"18668","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"269379"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"105","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,武侠,穿越,多女主,诸天万界,天才","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ed51086c3e5be8c03fac89406d7f6d59~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779467139&x-signature=cgBnSjTS25%2BqS67KZJTCZArXH7Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"53306811956","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"37"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324002538B8ABA823E0020A26E95D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读37分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":32,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2198,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3820},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7617110784648823577","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"从魔法之神无时无刻监视着主角并能无偿得到主角的技能就已经很压抑了，后来主角想不开实行信仰成神计划就更压抑了，再后来魔法之神直接捧杀主角以魔法位面主角的性命威胁主角就有点看不下去了，以我的经验来看未来不够乐观。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773498336,"group_id":"7600642581319388185","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"734129256410855"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7600642581319388185","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"62"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"6","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":23718,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7611343148603114265","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"武道技能每学会一门新武功就全属性+1，现在主角已经联络到了天龙的自我，我说个事儿——曼陀山庄，主角的全属性没有几百，我不服[奸笑]","text_exts":[{"e":31,"s":29,"text":"天龙","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A9%E9%BE%99&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742831390A26E95D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227611343148603114265%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227600642581319388185%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22
